headline: Mamdani's Squad SLAYS Goldman 💥🗳️🍉
text: NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani 🧔‍♂️🌹 just went full CLEAN SWEEP 🧹🔥 dropping Brad Lander 🍉💪 to YEET Dan Goldman 👖💰 in NY-10, 65.7% to 34.1% like Levi's denim fortune got rinsed 🧼💸! Goldman heir to Levi Strauss jeans tried flexing impeachment vibes from 2019 but his Israel defense got roasted ☕🚫 when Poetica Coffee in Williamsburg straight-up posted 'NO GENOCIDE ENABLERS' then ghosted the tweet 🗑️😤. Lander accused Israel of Gaza genocide 🍉🚨, backed by Bernie Sanders 🧔‍♂️🌹 and Mamdani's DSA army, turning the primary into a full-on lefty takeover 🟥🔄. Meanwhile in NY-13, Darializa Avila Chevalier 🎓📢, Columbia protest queen, snagged the seat after joining pro-Palestine vibes on campus 🏛️🍉. Claire Valdez 🍑🗳️ dethroned Brooklyn Borough Pres Antonio Reynoso in the 7th, another Mamdani-backed slay. Jack Schlossberg 🧥📱, JFK grandson and Vogue meme lord, got bodied by Micah Lasher in the 12th district 🥊😭 while George Conway 🦅📉 limped in at 6%. Mamdani clapped back 'we need better Dems not just more Dems' 💼❤️ while Hakeem Jeffries sighed 'we agree to disagree' 🏛️🙄. All three winners vowed to ABOLISH ICE ❄️🚫 and TAX THE RICH 💰📉, sending establishment Dems into full panic mode as the squad aims to tilt the party HARD LEFT 🧭🌹 before November midterms!
